overall.description: A third-person perspective walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, elevated walkways with distinctive arched structures, and a transition from dense urban core to waterfront promenade. The footage exhibits high-quality game engine rendering with ray-traced lighting and reflective surfaces characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated walkway following a pedestrian with a backpack

large vertical digital billboard displaying red advertisement
dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated pedestrian walkway in a dense cyberpunk city, characterized by distinctive curved neon arches overhead and towering skyscrapers in the background. The camera follows a pedestrian with a backpack through this sheltered corridor, with metal railings visible to the right and vibrant digital billboards illuminating the left side.

events.description: approaching and entering crosswalk at intersection with red traffic light visible
turning right onto new street direction while crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection and turning right onto a new avenue

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: futuristic traffic signal showing red light
red street sign indicating Langley Street
yellow painted zebra crossing stripes on asphalt

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wide urban intersection where the camera crosses the street at a crosswalk. A red traffic light and street signs become visible, while futuristic vehicles pass through the intersection. The curved arch structures from the previous segment recede behind as the camera turns onto a new street.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined boulevard with modern commercial buildings

events.description: transitioning from dense urban core to more open palm-lined street with less building density

agents.ego_description: walking along the palm tree lined sidewalk with modern buildings on the left

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the sidewalk in planters
contemporary building with distinctive cyan neon accent lighting
futuristic bus shelter with digital display showing Avante advertisement
illuminated sign indicating Charter Hill district

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to a more open boulevard lined with palm trees and modern buildings featuring cyan neon accents. The dense skyscraper cluster fades into the background as the camera passes a bus shelter and district signage, maintaining a steady walking pace along the concrete sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade overlooking bay with distant tower

events.description: arriving at waterfront with open view of water body and illuminated tower across the bay
slowing down and approaching railing to observe the waterfront view

agents.ego_description: approaching the waterfront railing and pausing to look at the illuminated tower and water reflections

notable_agents.action: lone figure standing at railing looking out over the water

entered.detail: orange metal railing marking the edge of the promenade
dark water surface with reflections of city lights
tall slender tower with bright spotlights near the top
elevated highway or monorail bridge spanning across the water
dark industrial structure with 08 illuminated in red

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens onto a wide waterfront promenade with an expansive view of the water and a dramatically illuminated tower in the distance. The camera slows as it approaches the orange railing, revealing water reflections, an overpass bridge spanning the bay, and industrial buildings across the water. The scene is notably more open and tranquil compared to the dense urban environment at the start.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, neon-lit pedestrian corridor into the open expanse of a bustling futuristic intersection. It begins by following a pedestrian with a backpack along an elevated walkway, moving beneath a series of distinctive curved neon arches and towering skyscrapers. As the camera advances, the enclosed corridor gives way to a wide urban crossing, where the sheltered architecture recedes to reveal a red traffic light and street signs. The scene then shifts as the camera crosses the street amidst passing futuristic vehicles, finally turning onto a new road as the dense urban core opens up around it.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-lit urban boulevard toward a wide, tranquil waterfront promenade. It begins by moving along a concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees and modern buildings accented in cyan neon, as the dense cluster of skyscrapers gradually fades into the background. As the camera passes a bus shelter and district signage, the environment opens up, shifting the perspective from the enclosed city street toward the coast. The scene then expands onto a broad promenade, where the camera slows upon approaching an orange railing that overlooks the bay. Finally, the view opens to reveal shimmering water reflections, an overpass bridge, and a dramatically illuminated tower rising above distant industrial buildings.
